title: callitriche brutia var. hamulata
intro: Callitriche brutia var. hamulata, also known as the hairy-stemmed waterwort or creeping waterwort, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the family Plantaginaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are believed to possess medicinal value. The health benefits of Callitriche brutia var. hamulata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies for various health concerns.
